evidence: squeeze_long is clean but modest at 10 trades, $723 PnL, -214.2 worst MAE; charm_wall_breakaway_long is high expectancy with 5 trades, $987 PnL, -357 worst MAE. A dormant delta/charm breakout route may separate a related but distinct continuation regime without touching those incumbent thresholds.
name: Delta Charm Breakout Dormant Attribution Probe
risk: The route may be unreachable, or it may cannibalize high-quality squeeze_long/charm_wall_breakaway_long entries without adding incremental PnL.
trigger: VALID_0DTE strong option-flow/charm continuation state that is not cleanly captured by squeeze_long or charm_wall_breakaway_long.
validation_metric: Positive standalone delta_charm_breakout_long PnL, total net profit >=98% of run_055, no more than 10% degradation in squeeze_long plus charm_wall_breakaway_long PnL, worst MAE no worse than -655.2, and slow_12h remains 0.

evidence: call_wall_acceptance_long owns the -655.2 worst MAE but also contributes $640.5 from only two trades, including the largest winner. Static pruning has repeatedly risked suppressing profit, while path fields show the issue is delayed realization after early progress.
name: Call-Wall Convex Recovery Monitor
risk: Can overfit a two-trade profile and cut the rare convex winner unless validated against protected fast-winner retention and out-of-sample days.
trigger: call_wall_acceptance_long entry with wide target or extended ES-VWAP that fails to convert early favorable movement into sustained continuation.
validation_metric: Reduce worst MAE below -655.2 toward <= -513.4 while retaining >=70% call-wall PnL, total net profit >=98% of leader, and slow_12h remains 0.
